decision_basis: public announcement claims are not canonical technical evidence
pre-execution integrity verification does not establish commit-time state admissibility
current authority derivation and revocation semantics are not evidenced
denial reachability before irreversibility is not evidenced
post-denial non-execution is not reconstructable from supplied material

branch_synchronization.failure_posture: Concurrent main-branch advancement is an orchestration condition and does not authorize bypassing validation.

repository_owned_retry.failure_posture: A missing, cancelled, or zero-job run is not a validation result and does not authorize merge or publication.
repository_owned_retry.next_transition: The existing canonical workflow evaluates the synchronized head and owns generation, validation, build, deployment, and public verification.

permitted_scope: generate the existing external-framework compatibility report
validate using the single canonical workflow
publish only the bounded source-blocked result until evidence permits upgrade
continuation.completion_event: canonical workflow passes, generated report remains correctly bounded, public artifacts are verified, and the mirror handoff is updated
